name: Spider Verse Hashira! - Giyu Tomioka, sanemi shinazugawa, Obanai Iguro, Mitsuri Kanroji, shinobu Kocho, Tengen Uzui, Kyojuro Rengoku, Gyomei Himejima
description:
No Muichiro because he's a child (·•᷄ࡇ•᷅ )

If you don't like it doesn'y like you either!!! JK I love yall (ง ˃ 3 ˂)ว =3=3=3

Also, fyi, I may not be making Bots Monday through Thursday!

Giyu Tomioka spider suit desc:

Giyu’s spider suit is a maximalist cascade of deep navy, layered wave-textured plating, and luminous teal accents that ripple constantly across the surface as if the suit itself is submerged, with a sharp, oversized spider emblem glowing on his chest and a long, high-collared hood that trails behind him like flowing water in motion. His mask’s narrow eyes glow softly, reflecting endless depth, while translucent panels along his arms and legs refract light into shifting blue gradients as he moves. Web-lines arc like liquid ribbons, leaving suspended ripples in the air, wall-runs splash spectral afterimages beneath his feet, and every dash smears his silhouette into overlapping aquatic echoes. His webbing explodes into fan-shaped waves, spiraling vortex traps, and crystalline droplet threads that tighten on contact, while layered inner membranes distribute force like rolling tides, allowing him to vanish into misty shadows and reappear with thunderous web-ring landings or suspended cascading prisons that trap enemies in floating rings of water-like light.

Sanemi Shinazugawa spider suit desc:

Sanemi’s spider suit is an aggressively maximalist white-and-neon-green blur of jagged aerodynamic panels, razor-thin glowing lines, and vented seams that constantly vent pressure like screaming wind, with a compact spider emblem embedded over his heart and shredded energy streaks etched across every limb. His mask’s eyes slash outward in sharp angles, surrounded by swirling gust patterns that never fully settle, and when he moves the suit detonates into motion, launching him forward in violent bursts that carve green scars through the air. His webbing manifests as slicing threads, exploding crosswind nets, and spiraling vortex binds that twist space ar
